baseline_scope_note: Current repo implementation: segmentation, landmark, headpose, attribute, age, gender, race, visibility. Not the full 10-task paper baseline.

metric_columns.metric: Original raw script metric, retained for backward compatibility.
metric_columns.raw_gap_metric_minus_target: Deprecated mixed-unit gap column; intentionally left blank.
metric_columns.normalized_metric_unit: percent, degrees, nme_percent, years, or raw.
metric_columns.normalized_gap_metric_minus_target: normalized_metric minus paper_target when the row dataset matches the paper target dataset.

normalization_rules.landmark: raw NME already percent; normalized-coordinate datasets use sqrt(2) as image diagonal
normalization_rules.age: raw MAE already years; bucket targets are converted to representative age-bin centers
